arts.ttl: WhoScored's European Team of the Week: Barcelona, Real Madrid, Newcastle, Liverpool
arts.sum: Barcelona youngster Fermin Lopez is the European Player of the Week after the Blaugrana smashed Valencia on Sunday night. Getafe, Le Havre, Genoa, Montpellier, Lens, St. Pauli, Liverpool, Bournemouth...

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid are suddenly angry with what's happening with Trent Alexander-Arnold
How Real Madrid Can Qualify for the Champions League Round of 16
arts.sum: Real Madrid need to defeat Brest and hope many results swing in their favor to automatically qualify for the Champions League round of 16.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe Targets Robert Lewandowski As La Liga Scoring Race Heats Up Between Clasico Rivals
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Kylian Mbappé is now just two goals behind Barcelona's Robert Lewandowski in the La Liga scoring race.
